title: Les Salopes or the Naturally Wanton Pleasure of Skin
original_title: Les Salopes ou le sucre naturel de la peau
overview: Revealing women, showing men Dermatology professor Marie-Claire is embarking on a new project linking skin cells and sexuality, when unexpected events disrupt her professional, family and intimate life.
